name: GI-102 plus GIB-7
summary: Investigational combination of a CD80-mutant IL-2 immunocytokine and synbiotic formula being tested for immune-aging biomarkers in a small recruiting phase 2a trial.
mechanism_summary: Combines immune cytokine signaling and synbiotic microbiome modulation; the only current public evidence in this map is recruiting registry activity, not posted efficacy.

open_questions: Whether the recruiting trial posts interpretable NK-cell, CD8 T-cell, safety, physical-function, and microbiome results
Whether effects can be attributed to GI-102, GIB-7, or their combination
Whether cytokine and microbiome modulation belongs under immune rejuvenation, microbiome intervention, or both
